# Ivory Coast Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Ivory Coast's administrative hierarchy:
> 33 regions, 108 departments, 510 sub-prefectures.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 33
- Total departments: 108
- Total sub-prefectures: 510
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All departments (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-department.json)
- [All sub-prefectures (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-sub_prefecture.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Agneby-Tiassa](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/agneby-tiassa-ci03/) — 4 departments, 19 sub-prefectures
- [Bafing](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bafing-ci04/) — 3 departments, 15 sub-prefectures
- [Bagoue](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bagoue-ci05/) — 3 departments, 14 sub-prefectures
- [Belier](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/belier-ci06/) — 4 departments, 15 sub-prefectures
- [Bere](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bere-ci07/) — 3 departments, 9 sub-prefectures
- [Bounkani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bounkani-ci08/) — 4 departments, 17 sub-prefectures
- [Cavally](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/cavally-ci09/) — 4 departments, 17 sub-prefectures
- [District Autonome D&#39;Abidjan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/district-autonome-dabidjan-ci01/) — 1 departments, 5 sub-prefectures
- [District Autonome De Yamoussoukro](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/district-autonome-de-yamoussoukro-ci02/) — 2 departments, 4 sub-prefectures
- [Folon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/folon-ci10/) — 2 departments, 7 sub-prefectures
- [Gbeke](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/gbeke-ci11/) — 4 departments, 20 sub-prefectures
- [Gbokle](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/gbokle-ci12/) — 2 departments, 9 sub-prefectures
- [Goh](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/goh-ci13/) — 2 departments, 16 sub-prefectures
- [Gontougo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/gontougo-ci14/) — 5 departments, 29 sub-prefectures
- [Grands Ponts](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/grands-ponts-ci15/) — 3 departments, 10 sub-prefectures
- [Guemon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/guemon-ci16/) — 4 departments, 23 sub-prefectures
- [Hambol](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/hambol-ci17/) — 3 departments, 19 sub-prefectures
- [Haut-Sassandra](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/haut-sassandra-ci18/) — 4 departments, 23 sub-prefectures
- [Iffou](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/iffou-ci19/) — 3 departments, 15 sub-prefectures
- [Indenie-Djuablin](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/indenie-djuablin-ci20/) — 3 departments, 14 sub-prefectures
- [Kabadougou](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kabadougou-ci21/) — 5 departments, 15 sub-prefectures
- [Loh-Djiboua](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/loh-djiboua-ci22/) — 3 departments, 17 sub-prefectures
- [Marahoue](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/marahoue-ci23/) — 3 departments, 18 sub-prefectures
- [Me](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/me-ci24/) — 4 departments, 17 sub-prefectures
- [Moronou](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/moronou-ci25/) — 3 departments, 11 sub-prefectures
- [N&#39;Zi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nzi-ci27/) — 3 departments, 10 sub-prefectures
- [Nawa](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nawa-ci26/) — 4 departments, 11 sub-prefectures
- [Poro](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/poro-ci28/) — 4 departments, 27 sub-prefectures
- [San Pedro](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/san-pedro-ci29/) — 2 departments, 11 sub-prefectures
- [Sud-Comoe](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sud-comoe-ci30/) — 4 departments, 17 sub-prefectures
- [Tchologo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tchologo-ci31/) — 3 departments, 12 sub-prefectures
- [Tonkpi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tonkpi-ci32/) — 5 departments, 33 sub-prefectures
- [Worodougou](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/worodougou-ci33/) — 2 departments, 11 sub-prefectures

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (department), 3 (sub-prefecture)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Ivory Coast Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/ivory-coast-administrative-divisions

- [ListBase](https://www.listbase.org) — Structured reference data for every country

- [thailand-administrative-divisions](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions)
